text:
(In reply to Eitan Adler from comment #2)
(In reply to Colin Percival from comment #3)
(In reply to Tom Smith from comment #4)

At a glance: more recent bug 257247 appears to be a duplicate of the "don't ask questions" aspect of opening comment 0. 

As the more recent report includes a question to developers, let's close this report. 

phoffman, thank you for your suggestion. 

^Triage: 

* avoidance of [tags] in summary lines
* feature (keyword)
* priority reduced, to the norm for an enhancement request.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 257247 ***
